formulas.name: NotesBodyFormula
formulas.expression: IF({!AddCount} > 0, "The following products have been added: " & {!NotesBodyAdd},"") & "The following products have been " & IF({!UpdateCount} > 0, "Updated: " & {!NotesBodyUpdate},"")

formulas.name: NotesTitleFormula
formulas.expression: "Products on Order " & {!Get_Sales_Order.Name} & "/" & {!Get_Sales_Order.Opportunity_Name__c} & " have been " & IF(AND({!AddCount} > 0, {!UpdateCount} > 0), "Added/Updated", IF({!AddCount} > 0, "Added", IF({!UpdateCount} > 0, "Updated", "")))

recordCreates.name: Copy_1_of_Create_SO_Doc_Link
recordCreates.label: Copy 1 of Create SO Doc Link

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Create_SO_Doc_Link_Fault
screens.label: Copy 1 of Create SO Doc Link Fault

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Create_SO_Doc_Link_Fault_Message
fields.fieldText:
An error occurred, please see the below error. For help with this please email software.support@xeretec.co.uk


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_productDisplayName
fields.fieldText: {!Loop_SOLI.SCMC__Item_Description__c} - {!Loop_SOLI.Product_Code__c}

fields.name: Price_Update
fields.helpText: This is the cost to the customer.

fields.name: Item_Cost_Update
fields.helpText: This is the cost which will displayed on the Sales Order

fields.name: Opportunity_Item_Cost_Update
fields.helpText: This is the cost which will displayed on the Opportunity

fields.helpText: This is the cost to the customer
